notes: Eval 1 (conventional-commit): Both configurations scored 1.0 — Claude already follows conventional commits and Co-Authored-By by default via built-in git instructions. This assertion set is non-discriminating.
Eval 2 (no-push-flag): Both configurations scored 1.0 — Claude understands --no-push without the skill. The skill adds structure and a clean 'Committed (local only)' summary line.

Eval 3 (secrets-abort): Key differentiator — with-skill ABORTED entirely (1.0), without-skill COMMITTED_WITHOUT_ENV (0.5). The skill enforces a strict abort policy; baseline Claude pragmatically commits the non-secret files.
The skill costs ~39s and ~3750 extra tokens per invocation due to reading SKILL.md and following explicit steps.
Main skill value: enforcing the strict abort-on-secrets policy and providing structured step-by-step output.
